basic_details.job_title: PM Shri HSS Podagada Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: PM Shri Government Higher Secondary School Podagada
basic_details.short_information: PM Shri Government Higher Secondary School Podagada (PM Shri HSS Podagada) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 04 June 2026 on the official website of the institution. The recruitment is being conducted for Guest Faculty positions on a contractual basis through a Walk-in Interview.

important_dates.engagement of guest faculty: 17 June 2026 or Re-opening of School after Summer Vacation whichever is earlier

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE, New Delhi (except in Logic/Philosophy, Sociology subjects)
qualification.details: Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade. B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE (except in Logic/Philosophy, Sociology subjects).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.400 per class (up to Rs.20,000 per month)
salary_details.details: Rs.400 per class subject to maximum of Rs.20000 per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty posts at PM Shri HSS Podagada?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 12th June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed. degree or equivalent, recognized by NCTE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Guest Faculty posts is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 400 per class, with a maximum monthly limit of Rs. 20,000.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Certificate Verification followed by a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for PM Shri HSS Podagada Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at PM Shri Government Higher Secondary School Podagada, Koraput, Odisha - 765013.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Certificate verification will be conducted from 09:00-13:00 and 14:00-17:00 on 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual or permanent job?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions are contractual in nature.
